arts.ttl: Flick tipped to rest Lewandowski & Araujo for Barca’s Copa del Rey tie
arts.sum: The German boss did hint he would rotate his team for the game due to the fact Barcelona play late on Thursday and then face Sevilla away on Sunday. The Barca boss rotated last time his team played Valencia just a few weeks ago in La Liga and saw his side romp to a 7-1 win .

arts.ttl: Real Madrid and Barcelona aren’t always Spain’s two biggest clubs
arts.sum: Real Madrid travel to Leganés in the quarterfinals of the 2024/25 Copa del Rey on Wednesday (February 5) looking to keep their hopes of winning the competition for the 21st time alive. The surprise team that has won the Copa del Rey more than Real Madrid

arts.ttl: Barcelona legend takes swipe at Real Madrid for 'smokescreen' referee complaints
arts.sum: Real Madrid lodged a formal complaint to the RFEF over the standard of officiating in Spain, suggesting they are intentionally treated unfairly.
